item.title: This 2 year old is going places ...
item.description: With his Daddy of course. The kid knows a Porsche and an Audi and all sorts of things. When the kid asks for his own bike the Daddy stops dead. Considers it and meekly says, "okay"

item.title: I've been making daily single panel comics as an exercise and I've picked the best few from the past few weeks to post.
item.description:
This one might require a google, but I couldn't resist.
Front Page edit: Thanks to everyone for getting this to the front page and for all the kind comments! If you would like to see the daily updates or other comic things I do, I'm on instagram as @gnomishcomics
item.dc:creator: LeastoftheLesserKeys

item.title: Dave Columbo (@Davecolumbo): This is "The Week in Trump". No jokes or commentary just a dry matter-of-fact list of Trump administration shenanigans this week that we'd otherwise forget next. Tips week. For the week ending July 18th, 2026.
item.description: [For anyone else wondering about Dave's T-shirt it's by Stephen Andrade Illustration.] Stephen Andrade: "The Watchers From Space" – Vintage Pulp Edition Acrylic and Digital (2015). In addition to the original painting I created two series of prints for the "Idiot Box 2" show at Gallery1988. The first was an edition of "The Watchers From Space" as painted; the second was this edition inspired by vintage sci-fi pulp magazines. Text and weathering was added digitally, as well as a shout-out to some of MST3K's key cast members.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.description: Mini pigs are cleaner and smarter than you think. They can be fully litter-trained, learn tricks like a dog, follow routines, and even recognize 100+ words.

item.title: PRETENTIOUS DUMP WITH ART AND IMMATURE HUMOR VOL 102
item.description:
“The exercise of imagination is dangerous to those who profit from the way things are because it has the power to show that the way things are is not permanent, not universal, not necessary.” – Ursula K. Le Guin Track of this dump: Rockers Hi Fi – Period Of Babylon https://open.spotify.com/track/7HqdKzGE7tgiRGqZyILWre (not found on yt or soundcloud, sry) Birmingham duo Rockers Hi-Fi began making music together in 1991, gradually shifting from ambient dub toward what would become trip-hop. Their rugged, dubby sound has a certain swagger. Like this track with its hypnotic, nihilistic Babylon mantra, originally released in 1995 and reissued last month. (Almost) all tracks from these dumps collected as a playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLJDc9T0OWY2I Vol 101 found here: https://imgur.com/gallery/pretentious-dump-with-art-immature-humor-vol-101-8cP8dx3
The Balinese Kecak dance is a modern adaptation of the ancient animist Sanghyang trance ritual, predating the arrival of Hinduism. Today mainly performed as entertainment for tourists, it originated as a sacred practice dedicated to exorcism and spiritual healing. Scene from the film Baraka.
Art: @AnthonyChristopherArt.
Art: Alan Williams.
Art: Casey Weldon.
Art: https://www.erikas.design/.
Art: @fiddlewheelx.
Art: Kristin Eriksson.
You read this in his voice.
item.dc:creator: NinjaCongo

item.dc:creator: fallibledegenerate

item.title: Life sucks some times
item.description: My mom died and I was her caregiver for 3 years. Got paid when she wasn't in the hospital but the last month was really bad. Then she passed suddenly and I'm selling her cars, stuff I have and generally trying to make ends meet. I'm looking for work and trying to grieve. I have a gofund me if any one can help, be it words of comfort or a buck or two. https://gofund.me/4b25041d0
item.dc:creator: WildcardDaddy
